modmenu.descriptionTranslation.mvs: Moogs Voyager Structures transforms your Minecraft experience with dynamic and engaging new structures. Crafted using vanilla blocks and entities, these structures seamlessly integrate into the game, offering exciting loot, challenging enemies, and friendly villagers. Compatible with any modpack, this mod enhances your world while preserving the classic Minecraft feel. Dive into a world of adventure and discovery with Moogs Voyager Structures!

modmenu.descriptionTranslation.mes: Moog's End Structures breathes new life into the End dimension by introducing a range of new structures that blend perfectly with the existing landscape. Each structure is crafted with care using vanilla blocks and entities to keep that classic Minecraft feel. As you explore the End, you'll come across unique challenges, tough enemies, and valuable loot. This mod works with any modpack and can be installed alongside Moog's Voyager Structures (MVS) for an even richer gameplay experience. Dive into the End with Moog's End Structures and discover the hidden treasures that await!
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.mns: Moogs Nether Structures adds new and exciting structures to the Nether dimension in Minecraft. You'll find new loot, tough enemies, and fun challenges as you explore. This mod works great on its own or with our main structure mod, MVS. It fits well into any modpack and keeps the vanilla feel of the game. Jump into the Nether and see what you can discover!
